businesses.name: Little Stars Childcare Center
businesses.description: Licensed childcare center near Fort Example offering full-time and part-time care for infants through pre-K. Secure facility with outdoor playground and structured curriculum. Tours available by appointment.

businesses.name: Growing Minds Preschool
businesses.description: Play-based preschool with small class sizes and focus on social-emotional learning. Offers extended care options for military families.

businesses.name: Sunrise Learn & Play
businesses.description: Affordable childcare option with military discount. Offers after-school care and summer programs for elementary-aged children.

businesses.name: Camp Sample Child Development Center
businesses.description: On-base childcare center at Camp Sample with priority for active-duty families. Age-appropriate classrooms and USDA-approved meals.

businesses.name: Patriot Pizza & Wings
businesses.description: Family-friendly pizza restaurant offering delivery to Fort Example housing and the barracks. Gluten-free and vegan options available.

businesses.name: Dragon Express
businesses.description: Quick-service Asian takeout with on-base delivery for dinner hours. Popular combo plates and family meals.

businesses.name: Gate 7 Taco Truck
businesses.description: Food truck parked just outside Gate 7 of Fort Example serving tacos, burritos, and quesadillas. Walk-up only, no on-base delivery.

businesses.name: Harbor Grill
businesses.description: Seafood and grill restaurant overlooking the water near Naval Station Demo. Dine-in and curbside pickup only.

businesses.name: Gate Garage Auto Repair
businesses.description: Full-service auto repair shop just outside Fort Example. Services include oil changes starting at $49.95, brake work, alignments, and AC service. Military discount available.

businesses.name: Budget Brakes & Lube
businesses.description: Independent repair shop specializing in brakes and quick lube services. Standard oil change service is $64.99. Walk-ins welcome.

businesses.name: Camp Sample Quick Lube
businesses.description: On-base quick lube and oil change center for Camp Sample. Basic oil change $55.00. No major repairs performed.

businesses.name: Regulation Cuts Barber Shop
businesses.description: Traditional barber shop just outside Fort Example main gate. Specializes in regulation cuts, fades, and beard trims. Offers weekly military specials.

businesses.name: Camp Sample Barbers
businesses.description: On-base barber shop at Camp Sample with walk-in service and discounted rates for trainees.

businesses.name: Relax & Renew Spa
businesses.description: Day spa offering massages, facials, and nail services near Fort Example. Military spouse-owned.

businesses.name: Fort Example Exchange
businesses.description: Main post exchange with retail shopping, food court, and services for Fort Example community.
businesses.address: Bldg 1000, Exchange Rd, Fort Example, TX 78100

businesses.name: Gateview Inn
businesses.description: Budget-friendly motel within 5 minutes of Fort Example main gate. Free breakfast and Wi-Fi.

events.title: Fort Example New Resident Housing Orientation
events.description: Overview of on-base housing policies, maintenance procedures, and community resources for new residents at Fort Example.

events.title: On-Base Housing Neighborhood Bus Tour
events.description: Guided bus tour of Fort Example family housing areas, playgrounds, and nearby amenities.
events.location: Meet at Welcome Center Parking Lot, Fort Example

events.title: Virtual Housing Q&A for Incoming Families
events.description: Live online Q&A session about waitlists, pet policies, and off-base housing options for families PCSing to Fort Example.
events.location: Online (Microsoft Teams link sent after RSVP)

events.title: Camp Sample Housing & Barracks Briefing
events.description: Monthly briefing covering barracks standards, UH policies, and family housing at Camp Sample.

events.title: Spring Egg Hunt & Picnic
events.description: Family-friendly egg hunt, games, and picnic area at Fort Example parade field.

events.title: Basic Car Care Clinic
events.description: Learn how to check fluids, change a tire, and understand routine maintenance schedules.

events.title: Camp Sample New Spouse Welcome
events.description: Welcome event and resource fair for spouses new to Camp Sample.

events.title: Harbor Cleanup Volunteer Day
events.description: Join Naval Station Demo community members for a harbor shoreline cleanup.

events.title: Garrison Town Hall
events.description: Quarterly town hall where leadership answers questions about ongoing projects and quality-of-life initiatives.

events.title: Virtual Military Spouse Job Fair
events.description: Online job fair connecting military spouses with remote and local employment opportunities.

housing_units.title: Eagle Crest 3BR Townhome - Building 12B
housing_units.description: Two-story 3-bedroom, 2-bath townhome in Eagle Crest neighborhood with attached garage and fenced backyard. Short walk to playground and elementary school.

housing_units.title: Eagle Crest 3BR End Unit - Building 14D
housing_units.description: End-unit townhome with extra windows, 3 bedrooms, 2.5 baths, and upgraded flooring. Located on a quiet cul-de-sac in Eagle Crest.

housing_units.title: Oak View 3BR Single-Family Home - 8A
housing_units.description: Detached 3-bedroom, 2-bath home with large shade trees and covered patio. Close to dog park and walking trails.

housing_units.title: Maple Row 3BR Duplex - 5C
housing_units.description: 3-bedroom duplex with 1.5 baths and carport parking. Recently updated kitchen. Available earlier in the summer.

housing_units.title: Dogwood Apartments 2BR with In-Unit Laundry
housing_units.description: Modern 2-bedroom apartment 10 minutes from Fort Example with in-unit washer/dryer and dog park on site. Pets welcome with deposit.

housing_units.title: Dogwood Apartments 2BR Corner Unit
housing_units.description: Corner 2-bedroom unit with extra windows, balcony, and in-unit laundry. Small pets allowed.

housing_units.title: Pine Hills 1BR Apartment
housing_units.description: Affordable 1-bedroom apartment near shopping. Laundry facilities on-site but not in-unit. Cats allowed.
housing_units.address: 500 Pine Hills Dr Apt 3B, Exampleville, TX 78100

housing_units.title: Lakeview 3BR Apartment with Garage
housing_units.description: Spacious 3-bedroom apartment overlooking the lake with attached garage. No pets allowed.

housing_units.title: Cedar Grove 4BR Single-Family Home
housing_units.description: Large 4-bedroom, 3-bath home with fenced yard and two-car garage in Cedar Grove subdivision 15 minutes from Fort Example.

housing_units.title: Camp Sample 2BR Duplex
housing_units.description: Standard 2-bedroom duplex unit in Camp Sample family housing area. Walkable to CDC and shoppette.

housing_units.title: Oakridge 2BR near Camp Sample
housing_units.description: Recently renovated 2-bedroom apartment five minutes from Camp Sample main gate. No pets allowed.

housing_units.title: Waterfront 3BR Townhouse
housing_units.description: 3-bedroom townhouse with partial bay views on Naval Station Demo. Short commute to piers.

housing_units.title: Juniper Row 2BR Townhome
housing_units.description: Entry-level 2-bedroom townhome ideal for couples or small families. Near the community center.

housing_units.title: Riverbend 2BR Pet-Friendly Apartment
housing_units.description: Pet-friendly 2-bedroom apartment with dog park and community pool. Washer/dryer hookups only.

housing_units.title: Oak Meadows 2BR (No Pets)
housing_units.description: Quiet 2-bedroom unit in a smaller complex. No pets allowed. In-unit washer/dryer and assigned parking.
housing_units.address: 310 Oak Meadows Ln Apt 5, Exampleville, TX 78100

lodging_properties.name: Fort Example Inn - Main Lodge
lodging_properties.description: Official on-base lodge at Fort Example offering standard rooms and family suites within walking distance of the PX.
lodging_properties.address: Bldg 1200, Lodge Rd, Fort Example, TX 78100
lodging_properties.cancellation_policy: Free cancellation up to 24 hours before check-in.

lodging_properties.name: Fort Example Family Suites
lodging_properties.description: Two-room family suites with kitchenettes, ideal for PCS and extended stays. Short drive from the main gate.
lodging_properties.address: Bldg 1215, Family Ln, Fort Example, TX 78100
lodging_properties.cancellation_policy: Free cancellation up to 48 hours before check-in; one night charge thereafter.

lodging_properties.name: Gateview Motel
lodging_properties.description: Budget off-base motel two miles from Fort Example. Limited parking, small rooms ideal for short stays.
lodging_properties.cancellation_policy: Non-refundable advance purchase or flexible rate with 24-hour cancellation.

lodging_properties.name: Exampleville Suites
lodging_properties.description: All-suite hotel with indoor pool and complimentary breakfast about 8 miles from Fort Example.
lodging_properties.cancellation_policy: Free cancellation until 18:00 local time on day of arrival.

lodging_properties.name: Camp Sample Lodge
lodging_properties.description: On-base temporary lodging for Camp Sample with standard and pet-friendly rooms.
lodging_properties.address: Bldg 50, Lodging Loop, Camp Sample, NC 28500
lodging_properties.cancellation_policy: Free cancellation up to 24 hours before check-in.

lodging_properties.name: Camp Sample Guest House
lodging_properties.description: Small guest house on a quiet cul-de-sac near the training area. Ideal for short visits.
lodging_properties.cancellation_policy: 50% refund if canceled at least 7 days before check-in.

lodging_properties.name: Naval Station Demo Lodge
lodging_properties.description: Waterfront lodge at Naval Station Demo with standard rooms and suites.
lodging_properties.address: Lodge Pier Rd, Naval Station Demo, CA 92000
lodging_properties.cancellation_policy: Free cancellation up to 72 hours before check-in.

lodging_properties.name: Fort Example Extended Stay Suites
lodging_properties.description: Extended stay hotel with full kitchens in every suite, 12 minutes from the main gate.
lodging_properties.cancellation_policy: Free cancellation up to 48 hours before check-in.

lodging_properties.name: Exampleville B&B
lodging_properties.description: Local bed-and-breakfast in a historic home downtown. About 20 minutes from Fort Example.
lodging_properties.cancellation_policy: Non-refundable deposit equal to first night; balance due at check-in.

business_services.name: Basic Oil Change
business_services.description: Conventional oil change with up to 5 quarts of oil and standard filter.

business_services.name: Full Synthetic Oil Change
business_services.description: Premium full synthetic oil change with multi-point inspection.

business_services.name: Tire Rotation
business_services.description: Rotate and inspect all four tires; includes air pressure check.

business_services.name: Brake Pad Replacement (Per Axle)
business_services.description: Includes new brake pads and inspection of rotors and calipers.

business_services.name: Standard Oil Change
business_services.description: Conventional oil and filter change with 21-point inspection.

business_services.name: Brake Inspection
business_services.description: Inspection of pads, rotors, lines, and fluid. Fee applied toward brake service if completed same day.

business_services.name: Basic Oil Change
business_services.description: Up to 5 quarts of conventional oil, standard filter, and fluid top-off.

business_services.name: Tire Rotation
business_services.description: Quick tire rotation service for most passenger vehicles.

business_services.name: Men's Regulation Haircut
business_services.description: Standard regulation cut suitable for active-duty service members.

business_services.name: Beard Trim & Line-Up
business_services.description: Beard trim with razor line-up and hot towel finish.

business_services.name: Standard Haircut
business_services.description: Walk-in standard haircut for trainees and permanent party.

business_services.name: 60-Minute Swedish Massage
business_services.description: Full-body Swedish massage focused on relaxation and stress relief.

business_services.name: 30-Minute Refresh Facial
business_services.description: Express facial designed to cleanse, exfoliate, and hydrate.

discount_offers.title: 15% Off Haircuts at Regulation Cuts
discount_offers.description: Save 15% on any regular-priced haircut Monday through Thursday with military ID.
discount_offers.terms: Valid Mon–Thu only. Must present valid military ID. Not combinable with other offers.

discount_offers.title: 10% Off Standard Cuts at Camp Sample Barbers
discount_offers.description: Trainees and permanent party receive 10% off standard haircuts every Saturday.
discount_offers.terms: Valid on Saturdays only. Must show military or dependent ID at checkout.

discount_offers.title: 20% Off First Massage at Relax & Renew Spa
discount_offers.description: New clients receive 20% off any 60-minute or longer massage service.
discount_offers.terms: New clients only. One-time use. Gratuity not included.

discount_offers.title: $5 Off Family Meal at Patriot Pizza
discount_offers.description: Get $5 off any Family Meal Deal (2 large pizzas + wings) for on-base delivery.
discount_offers.terms: Valid for delivery orders to Fort Example housing only. Minimum purchase $30 before tax and fees.

discount_offers.title: 12% Off Family Combo at Dragon Express
discount_offers.description: Save 12% on the Family Combo (4 entrées + 3 sides) after 1700 hrs.
discount_offers.terms: Valid after 1700 daily. Dine-in or delivery to Fort Example only.

discount_offers.title: 10% Off Basic Oil Change at Gate Garage
discount_offers.description: Take 10% off a Basic Oil Change service at Gate Garage Auto Repair.
discount_offers.terms: Valid on Basic Oil Change only. Must mention offer when booking online or at check-in.

discount_offers.title: 10% Off Grocery Purchase Over $50 at Fort Example Exchange
discount_offers.description: Save 10% on a single grocery transaction of $50 or more at the Fort Example Exchange.
discount_offers.terms: Valid in-store only. Excludes alcohol, tobacco, and gift cards.

discount_offers.title: Registration Fee Waived at Little Stars Childcare
discount_offers.description: New families receive a waived registration fee when enrolling in full-time care.
discount_offers.terms: Valid for new full-time enrollments only. Credit applied to first month's bill.

discount_offers.title: BOGO 50% Off Wings on Tuesdays
discount_offers.description: Buy one order of wings, get the second of equal or lesser value 50% off every Tuesday.
discount_offers.terms: Valid Tuesdays only. Discount applies to lower-priced wings order.
